title: Hotel, restaurant, and cafe complex
description: A comfortable place for stays, meals, meetings, and family celebrations with friendly service and practical guest facilities.

intro.title: Everything guests need in one place
intro.text: Our complex combines hospitality, food, events, and relaxation in one convenient location. Guests can come for a quiet meal, book a room, celebrate an important date, or organize a business meeting with support from our team.

sections.title: Hotel
items: Comfortable rooms for short and long stays
Wi-Fi, air conditioning, and essential room facilities
Secure parking for guests
Easy check-in and guest support

sections.title: Restaurant
items: Daily service for breakfast, lunch, and dinner
Local and European-style cuisine
Seasonal dishes and drinks
Room service may be available for hotel guests

sections.title: Banquet halls
items: Spaces for weddings, birthdays, and family events
Group menu and banquet options
Support with seating plan and timing
Atmosphere suitable for private celebrations

sections.title: Events and conferences
items: Space for business meetings and presentations
Coffee breaks, lunches, and dinners on request
Equipment options may be available
Flexible format for small and medium groups

sections.title: Relax zone
items: Relaxation areas for guests
Sauna, pool, terrace, or outdoor spaces may be available
Suitable for quiet rest after work or travel
Family-friendly leisure options

service.title: Our service
service.text: Our team helps guests plan their stay, meal, celebration, or meeting with attention to comfort, timing, and important details.
